content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow Daily Update (Apr 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 26, 2026, focused on strengthening the robustness and reliability of the n8n workflow plugin. The team opened four new pull requests aimed at enhancing prompt hardening, credential safety, keyword extraction accuracy, and pre-deployment validation processes to ensure more deterministic and secure agent operations.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Validation and Safety Mechanisms**
    *   Introduced a pre-deployment validation and repair pass, including a retry loop and layered anti-hallucination defenses. [#23](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/23)
    *   Implemented a deterministic safety net for injecting missing credential blocks into workflows. [#21](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/21)

*   **Prompt and Context Optimization**
    *   Extended the `RuntimeContextProvider` and applied prompt hardening to improve agent reliability. [#20](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/20)
    *   Added a `preferredProviders` bias hint to the keyword extraction process to refine service selection. [#22](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/22)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#23](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/23): feat(validation): validateAndRepair pre-deploy pass + retry loop + anti-hallucination layered defense
*   [#22](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/22): feat(prompt,types,service): preferredProviders bias hint for keyword extraction
*   [#21](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/21): feat(workflow): deterministic injectMissingCredentialBlocks safety net
*   [#20](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/20): feat(prompt,types): RuntimeContextProvider extension point + prompt hardening

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
